description: Configure the store's Minimum Order Amount policy to ensure profitability. Enable the policy with a minimum amount of $35.00, configured to include tax but not exclude discount amounts. Set the description message to 'Orders must be at least $35.00 to qualify for fulfillment.' and the cart error message to 'Your order is under $35.00. Please add more items to checkout.'. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.

metadata.expected_description: Orders must be at least $35.00 to qualify for fulfillment.
metadata.expected_error: Your order is under $35.00. Please add more items to checkout.
